mapper.select: SELECT po.order_id, po.supplier_id, po.store_id, po.order_date, po.expected_date, po.status, po.total_amount, po.notes, po.created_by, s.name AS supplier_name, st.name AS store_name FROM purchase_orders po JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id JOIN stores st ON po.store_id = st.store_id WHERE po.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT poi.order_item_id, poi.order_id, poi.variant_id, poi.ordered_qty, poi.received_qty, poi.unit_cost, p.name AS product_name, pv.sku, CASE WHEN poi.ordered_qty > 0 THEN CAST(poi.received_qty AS FLOAT) / poi.ordered_qty * 100 ELSE 0 END AS received_rate FROM purchase_order_items poi JOIN product_variants pv ON poi.variant_id = pv.variant_id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.product_id WHERE poi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_orders (supplier_id, store_id, expected_date, status, total_amount, notes, created_by) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{storeId}, #{expectedDate}, 'draft', #{totalAmount}, #{notes}, #{createdBy})
INSERT INTO purchase_order_items (order_id, variant_id, ordered_qty, unit_cost) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{variantId}, #{orderedQty}, #{unitCost})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_orders SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods_receipts (order_id, received_by, notes) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{receivedBy}, #{notes})
INSERT INTO goods_receipt_items (receipt_id, variant_id, received_qty, condition) VALUES (#{receiptId}, #{variantId}, #{receivedQty}, #{condition})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order_items SET received_qty = received_qty + #{qty} WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND variant_id = #{variantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND received_qty < ordered_qty
mapper.update: MERGE store_inventory AS t USING (SELECT #{storeId} AS store_id, #{variantId} AS variant_id) AS s ON t.store_id = s.store_id AND t.variant_id = s.variant_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.quantity = t.quantity + #{qty}, t.updated_at = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (store_id, variant_id, quantity, min_quantity) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{variantId}, #{qty}, 0);
mapper.select: SELECT supplier_id, name AS supplier_name, contact_name, phone, email FROM suppliers WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name
